prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TTX-SCRAPBOOKCRAFTKIT-26PC-BUN-2 Product Type: ART_CRAFT_KIT Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: Stationery Scrapbooking Supplies Crafts Kit with Paper Cutter Tweezers Scissors Stencils 12 x 9 Self Healing Cutting Mat 26pc Description: A fantastic stationery art supplies kit to meet all your craft and hobby project's needs. Show off your artistic and crafting talents with ToolTreaux Stationery Scrapbooking Supplies Crafts Kit with tools that allows for a wide range of craft and hobby activities from weeding vinyl, embossing and DIY paper cutting, to fabric cutting for quilts, scrapbooking and much more.

The 26 piece stationery crafts tool kit includes:

- 16PC HOBBY KNIFE SET: #2 Blade (2), #7 Blade (1), #10 Blade (1), #11 Blade (3), #12 Blade (1), #17 Blade (1), #19 Blade (1), #20 Blade (1), #21 Blade (1), #23 Blade (1), 3/8" Aluminum Collet & Plastic Grip Handle, 3/8" Aluminum Collet & Metal Handle, 1/4" Aluminum Collet & Metal Handle, Plastic Hard Case Storage Box

- 5PC PRECISION TWEEZER SET: 4-1/2" (114mm) Straight Stamp tweezer; 5 3/4" (146 mm) Solder/utility tweezer; 4" (101 mm) Tweezer; 4 1/2" (114 mm) Sharp Pointed Tweezer; 5 1/2" (139 mm) Tweezer with a Bent Tip

- 8PC STENCIL TEMPLATE SET: eight sheets of different stencils featuring ovals, circles, squares, hexagons, pentagons, triangles, perspective shapes and other assorted shapes; stencil templates are clear so you can easily see and maneuver around the rest of your work

- x1 SELF-HEALING MAT (12 x 9 inches)
- X1 PAPER TRIMMER
- X1 PAIR OF SCISSORS
- X1 STAINLESS STEEL RULER

Whether you're an expert crafter or just dabbling in a new found creative hobby, the ToolTreaux Stationery Scrapbooking Supplies Crafts Kit is the perfect place to begin your crafting and hobbyist journey; all the tools included in this kit are versatile, easy to use and crafting essentials you'll be able to use for multiple art projects. Let the creativity begin. Search Terms: craft supplies kits arts design hobby tools DIY project gifts for artists soldering watch repair jewlry making tweezers knife set paper crafting stationery sets quilting scrapbooking creative kids games back to school collage wedding gift Features: - STATIONERY CRAFTS KIT: A fantastic stationery art supplies kit to meet all your craft and hobby project needs! The art supplies crafts kit includes a large self-healing work surface mat (12 x 9 inches), a paper cutter, 5 precision tweezers, 8-piece stencil template set, a pair of scissors, a ruler and a 16-piece hobby knife set - VERSATILE CRAFTS KIT FOR ALL LEVELS: Whether you're an expert crafter or just dabbling in a new found creative hobby, the ToolTreaux Stationery Scrapbooking Supplies Crafts Kit is the perfect place to begin your crafting and hobbyist journey; all the tools included in this kit are versatile, easy to use and crafting essentials you'll be able to use for multiple art projects - MUST-HAVE SELF-HEALING MAT: The hero of this craft and stationery kit is the large self-healing cutting mat, that make the perfect base for all your projects, whether for cutting, measuring, drawing and more! The 45 and 60 degree line markers make creating angle cuts a breeze; these cutting mats are built to last and perfectly compatible with rotary cutters, rulers and utility knives - ESSENTIAL 16PC HOBBY KNIFE SET: Take on any craft or professional design project with the versatile 16 piece Hobby Knife Set! The 3 included knives are designed to make clean and accurate cuts in light, medium and heavy weight materials, while the 13 included blades offer different cutting abilities; Each knife features the easy-change blade system, making it a breeze to quickly change blades for the right cut - MULTIPURPOSE PRECISION TWEEZERS SET: This 5-piece stainless steel hobby tweezer set is perfect for fine tuning and intricate work such as beading, jewelry-making, watch repair, weeding vinyl decals, electronics, soldering or any other small detail work; The precision tweezer kit includes straight pointed tips, curved tips and flat tips for precise maneuvering === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 26pc Scrapbooking Craft Kit with Cutting Mat
